message: chore: rename project from zigpython to pymode

files.patch:
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-# ZigPython
+# PyMode
 
 Python compiled to WebAssembly using Zig, with metal0's Zig runtime replacing C extensions.
 
@@ -41,7 +41,7 @@ Metal0 has 300+ Zig stdlib modules that can replace CPython's C extensions.
 ## Architecture
 
 ```
-zigpython/
+pymode/
 ├── cpython/                    # CPython 3.13 source (git submodule)
 ├── patches/                    # Patches for zig cc compatibility
 ├── zig-modules/                # Zig replacements for C extensions

@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 {
-  "name": "zigpython",
+  "name": "pymode",
   "version": "0.1.0",
   "description": "Python compiled to WebAssembly using Zig, targeting Cloudflare Workers",
   "private": true,

@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+diff --git a/Include/cpython/pthread_stubs.h b/Include/cpython/pthread_stubs.h
+index e542eaa..c05e04d 100644
+--- a/Include/cpython/pthread_stubs.h
++++ b/Include/cpython/pthread_stubs.h
+@@ -78,6 +78,11 @@ PyAPI_FUNC(int) pthread_condattr_setclock(
+     pthread_condattr_t *attr, clockid_t clock_id);
+ 
+ // pthread
++// When zig cc targets wasi, the bundled wasi-libc already declares these
++// functions in <pthread.h> with POSIX-conformant signatures. Redeclaring
++// them here causes type conflicts (e.g. pthread_exit returns void in POSIX
++// but int here). Only declare when the libc does not provide them.
++#ifndef _PTHREAD_H
+ PyAPI_FUNC(int) pthread_create(pthread_t *restrict thread,
+                                const pthread_attr_t *restrict attr,
+                                void *(*start_routine)(void *),
+@@ -89,6 +94,7 @@ PyAPI_FUNC(int) pthread_exit(void *retval) __attribute__ ((__noreturn__));
+ PyAPI_FUNC(int) pthread_attr_init(pthread_attr_t *attr);
+ PyAPI_FUNC(int) pthread_attr_setstacksize(pthread_attr_t *attr, size_t stacksize);
+ PyAPI_FUNC(int) pthread_attr_destroy(pthread_attr_t *attr);
++#endif
+ 
+ 
+ // pthread_key

@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-name = "zigpython-worker"
+name = "pymode-worker"
 main = "bridge/worker.ts"
 compatibility_date = "2024-01-01"
 
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@ PYTHON = "build/python.wasm"
 # R2 bucket for file storage (Python open() calls)
 [[r2_buckets]]
 binding = "STORAGE"
-bucket_name = "zigpython-storage"
+bucket_name = "pymode-storage"
 
 # KV namespace for key-value storage (Python shelve/dbm)
 [[kv_namespaces]]
@@ -19,7 +19,7 @@ id = ""
 # D1 database for SQL (Python sqlite3)
 [[d1_databases]]
 binding = "DB"
-database_name = "zigpython-db"
+database_name = "pymode-db"
 database_id = ""
 
 [vars]
